user_query:
I’m prepping for a quick call with the B&B owner to reconcile my stays and make sure my referral credits were applied correctly. Please build and run a small command-line reconciliation that uses the local CSVs under input/ and produces a clean ledger and report, then run a validation check and prepare meeting notes with action items.

Inputs (do not modify these files):
- input/stays.csv
- input/payments.csv
- input/referrals.csv
- tests/expected_totals.json (validation targets)

Requirements:
1) Implement and run a script or command-line program that reads input/stays.csv, input/payments.csv, and input/referrals.csv and writes these outputs:
   - outputs/ledger.csv with columns: stay_id, check_in, check_out, nights, nightly_rate_usd, discount_usd, taxable_subtotal_usd, tax_usd, total_due_usd, referral_credit_applied_usd, payment_received_usd, balance_usd. Use the following calculations (round to 2 decimals):
     • taxable_subtotal_usd = (nights * nightly_rate_usd) - discount_usd
     • tax_usd = tax_rate * taxable_subtotal_usd
     • total_due_usd = (taxable_subtotal_usd + tax_usd) - referral_credit_applied_usd
     • payment_received_usd = sum of payments for the stay from input/payments.csv
     • balance_usd = total_due_usd - payment_received_usd
   - outputs/reconciliation_report.md with sections: Summary (aggregated totals), Discrepancies (any stay with balance_usd ≠ 0.00), Credits & Outstanding (referral credits earned vs. applied vs. unredeemed, and any open balance by stay).

2) Run tests/validation commands to verify outputs deterministically:
   - Create and run a validation command that loads outputs/ledger.csv and tests/expected_totals.json, recomputes aggregated totals, and writes outputs/validation_results.json showing booleans for these checks and an overall status:
     • total_due_after_credits_usd == total_taxable_subtotal_usd + total_tax_usd - referral_credits_applied_usd
     • outstanding_balance_usd == total_due_after_credits_usd - payments_received_usd
     • unredeemed_referral_credits_usd == referral_credits_earned_usd - referral_credits_applied_usd
     • outstanding_balance_usd == unredeemed_referral_credits_usd
     Include the computed and expected values for each field in the results for transparency.

3) Prepare meeting notes with action items:
   - outputs/meeting_notes.md with concise bullets I can read on the call, including: total spend, total taxes, payments received, unredeemed referral credits, any stay-level discrepancies (with amounts), and proposed next steps (e.g., apply remaining credits to a specific stay and confirm final balance). Use the figures derived from outputs/ledger.csv and the validation step so the numbers are consistent.

Deliverables to produce:
- outputs/ledger.csv
- outputs/reconciliation_report.md
- outputs/validation_results.json
- outputs/meeting_notes.md

All work should be self-contained in this workspace. The script(s) must be runnable locally and the validation must be executed so outputs reflect the current inputs. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
